verdict.answer_first: Tie: both state the answer immediately: A says “HTTPS is just HTTP running inside a TLS tunnel”; B says the same.
verdict.decisiveness: A is slightly more decisive because it finishes with a concrete mental model and warning, while B adds “Want me to go deeper,” which is unnecessary after answering.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it includes the Finished step and a crisp one-sentence summary: “TLS uses certificates and signatures… Diffie-Hellman… AEAD symmetric cipher.”
